kept.text:
Atlantic Aviation has opened its first 100% electric executive terminal at Napa County Airport — built for future eVTOL operations. 
Part of a network of five key Bay Area locations, in partnership with Archer Aviation to support electric air taxi service.
https://t.co/kev501UINU

profile_bio.description: This account is only for sharing news related to @flyarcher

value.string_value: Atlantic Aviation unveils a 100% electric Executive Terminal at Napa County Airport, supporting luxury aviation and future eVTOL operations.
Atlantic Aviation Opens Sustainable Executive Terminal at Napa County Airport
Atlantic Aviation Opens Sustainable Executive Terminal at Napa County Airport
